finding: FE-2 auth-token boundary: the injected provider feeds ONLY the existing `Authorization: Bearer ${token}` header path; no new logging/persistence of the token. The default localStorage source is byte-preserved. The fix CLOSES the pre-existing HIGH foot-gun (a non-`auth-storage` app silently sent every request unauthenticated) — an app now calls setAuthToken(...) and requests authenticate. No new leak surface.

routeGuards fail-closed seal ported verbatim: an empty guard slot + protected routes redirects to loginPath (never renders protected content ungated); the catch-all `*` route is guarded identically. Preserves ziee's security posture in the generic router.

getAuthToken() returns the localStorage value verbatim when no provider is injected (ziee's state); defaultAuthToken is the old body plus an SSR-safe `typeof localStorage` guard that is a no-op in a browser. ziee ui tsc + vite build green.

setAuthToken + setAuthTokenProvider re-exported from the api-client barrel alongside the existing setBaseUrlResolver/setUnauthorizedHandler DI setters; consistent naming + shape with the established injection points.

The router is NOT re-exported from the main barrel (only module-system/module/stores/events/overrides are). react-router-dom is peerDependenciesMeta.optional. An app not importing @ziee/framework/router pulls zero react-router.
react-router-dom added as an OPTIONAL peerDependency (^7.15.1, matching ziee ui + desktop ui). Not a hard dependency; the ./router export is the opt-in seam.

grep of router/** shows zero @/ or @ziee/kit or PermissionExpr/usePermission imports. All ziee coupling (permission gate, kit 403 UI, Loading, lazyWithPreload, /auth+/ literals) replaced by injection points with defaults. Domain-agnostic.

React.lazy type cached by loader identity (WeakMap) — ported from ziee's LazyComponentRenderer to avoid remounting a fresh <BrowserRouter> mid-render (dead-history bug). isValidElement / lazy-loader / plain-component branches preserved.

RegisteredStores.Routes declaration-merge + CreateModuleOptions.routes + Slots{routerEffects,routeGuards} merges are scoped to the router subpath (imported via router/index.ts side-effect), so Stores.Routes / module.routes type-check only when an app opts in. Framework package tsc --noEmit exit 0.

FE-3: @source is resolved relative to the CSS file by Tailwind v4, so the kit-shipped `../**/*.{ts,tsx}` glob points at the kit's own src from any consuming app. Functionally proven: @tailwindcss/node compile registers the kit-src source; oxide Scanner finds bg-primary/text-muted-foreground/rounded-md; build() emits .bg-primary + --primary.
App name 'ziee' used throughout; no 'ziee-chat'. Documents the exact one-line wiring (@import "@ziee/kit/styles/kit.css") + a tokens-only advanced path.

Minimal node --test extensionless-import resolver (mirrors ziee ui node-test-hooks.mjs) lets the new .test.ts smokes run standalone. Test infra only; not in package exports. FE-2 4/4 + FE-1 3/3 pass; FE-3 proof passes.
